text.title: Self-Healing Locators with Mandatory Audit Diff Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Healer accepts any CSS selector with matching text. Test clicks `Pay Now` button on a different page than intended.
antipattern.root-cause: Match dimensions reduced to CSS for `compatibility`.
antipattern.fix: Require role + accessible name as the minimum match dimensions; reject CSS-only heals.

antipattern.symptom: Healer applies heals to the next CI run without human review. Two months later, half the suite is healed against drifted UI.
antipattern.fix: Force heals to flow through a diff file + human merge; disable in-memory healing.

antipattern.symptom: Healer touches `/checkout` selectors. Customer report: paid the wrong amount.
antipattern.fix: Maintain a blocklist of payment/auth/PII routes; healer skips them and surfaces a manual triage ticket.
